Bash(python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)

print(f''''''''''''🎯 생성 방법: {d.get(""generation_method"")}'''''''''''')
print(f''''''''''''✅ 상태: {d.get(""status"")}'''''''''''')
print(f''''''''''''📝 메시지: {d.get(""message"")}\n'''''''''''')

if d.get(''''generation_method'''') == ''''llm'''':
    print(''''''''''''🎉 LLM 기반 생성 성공!\n'''''''''''')
    
    data = d.get(''''data'''', {})
    
    print(''''''''''''📊 생성된 콘텐츠:'''''''''''')
    print(f''''''''''''  • Hook Copies: {len(data.get(""hook_copies"", []))}개'''''''''''')
    print(f''''''''''''  • Key Benefits: {len(data.get(""key_benefits"", []))}개'''''''''''')
    print(f''''''''''''  • FAQ: {len(data.get(""faq"", []))}개'''''''''''')
    print(f''''''''''''  • 네이버 본문: {len(data.get(""naver_body"", """"))}자'''''''''''')
    print(f''''''''''''  • 쿠팡 본문: {len(data.get(""coupang_body"", """"))}자'''''''''''')
    
    warnings = d.get(''''compliance_warnings'''', [])
    print(f''''''''''''\n⚠️  컴플라이언스 경고: {len(warnings)}건'''''''''''')
    if warnings:
        for w in warnings[:3]:
            print(f''''''''''''  • {w}'''''''''''')
else:
    print(f''''''''''''⚠️  여전히 fallback 모드'''''''''''')
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
data = d.get(''''data'''', {})

print(''''''''''''🎯 LLM 생성 콘텐츠 샘플\n'''''''''''')
print(''''''''''''='''''''''''''''' * 60)

print(''''''''''''\n📝 메인 타이틀:'''''''''''')
print(f''''''''''''  {data.get(""main_title"", ""N/A"")}\n'''''''''''')

print(''''''''''''🎯 Hook Copies:'''''''''''')
for i, hook in enumerate(data.get(''''hook_copies'''', []), 1):
    print(f''''''''''''  {i}. {hook}'''''''''''')

print(''''''''''''\n💎 Key Benefits:'''''''''''')
for i, benefit in enumerate(data.get(''''key_benefits'''', [])[:3], 1):
    print(f''''''''''''  {i}. {benefit[:80]}...'''''''''''')

print(''''''''''''\n❓ FAQ (샘플):'''''''''''')
for i, faq in enumerate(data.get(''''faq'''', [])[:2], 1):
    print(f''''''''''''  Q{i}: {faq.get(""q"", ""N/A"")}'''''''''''')
    print(f''''''''''''  A{i}: {faq.get(""a"", ""N/A"")[:60]}...\n'''''''''''')

print(''''''''''''\n⚠️  컴플라이언스 경고:'''''''''''')
warnings = d.get(''''compliance_warnings'''', [])
for w in warnings[:5]:
    print(f''''''''''''  • {w}'''''''''''')
")

import sys, json

print(''''='''' * 60)

print(''''\n📝 메인 타이틀:'''')

print(''''🎯 Hook Copies:'''')
for i, hook in enumerate(data.get(''''hook_copies'''', []), 1):
    print(f''''  {i}. {hook}'''')

print(''''\n💎 Key Benefits:'''')
for i, benefit in enumerate(data.get(''''key_benefits'''', [])[:3], 1):
    print(f''''  {i}. {benefit[:80]}'''')

print(''''\n❓ FAQ (샘플):'''')
for i, faq in enumerate(data.get(''''faq'''', [])[:2], 1):
    print(f''''  Q{i}: {faq.get(""q"", ""N/A"")}'''')
    print(f''''  A{i}: {faq.get(""a"", ""N/A"")[:60]}...\n'''')
")
